title: card image fetch allows http:// URLs from untrusted OG metadata
description: fetch_card_image() in card.rs has no scheme check on image_url extracted from og:image meta tags. An attacker who controls a page being previewed can set og:image to an http:// URL. The card fetcher then downloads image content over cleartext HTTP with no integrity guarantee. A network MitM on that HTTP connection can inject a malicious image payload and trigger vulnerabilities in the image decoder (image crate). The outer fetch_and_store() requires https:// for the page URL but does not impose the same requirement on image_url, which comes directly from untrusted HTML content.
close_reason: Duplicate of broadside-3mgw.16 (same card image http:// scheme issue).
